channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree needs pruning/cutting back, 8th May
item.description:
Between houses 62 and 64 Beaconsfield road there is a tree which always sprouts low and scratches cars trying to park there. It's getting very long and can cause harm to children in pushchairs and wheelchair users. This Tree causes issues each year, could the bush at the bottom be cut back or removed please? It needs reporting several times a year. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish being dumped Registration YN17 LVK, 8th May
item.description:
This is being done regularly by a white van driver

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in Alleyway (Fridges & Other Rubbish), 8th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped a load of white goods in the alleyway entrance. This is happening far too often.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmoreland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped AGAIN at corner of Silvester St and Tabard St, 8th May
item.description:
Always rubbish here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping outside bus stop G combedale road, 8th May
item.description:

item.title: Broken uneven paving slabs, 8th May

item.title: Two bin bags dumped in the street by the road, not part of rubbish collection, 8th May
item.description:
This has been left out all week, obvious for all to see not outside anywhere that bins are left for collection but binmen would have clearly seen

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15A,15B, Augustine Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Works signage not removed, 8th May
item.description:
This has been reported and investigated as closed Ref 9409615. The attached photos was taken today, they are still there ? Its a green verg on New Kent Road and Ash Avenue opposite Sainsburys

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several bikes blocking and cluttering the pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Several Voi bikes have been blocking and cluttering the pavement on Ordnance Hill for about a week or more now. Reported to Voi on Monday. The bikes are still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Ordnance Hill, St. John's Wood, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Beds, sofas and general rat infestation, 7th May
